name: Aging barrel
description: Produces aged products, such as wine, kombucha, and aged cheese.

name: Bee house
description: Place a flower to produce honey.

name: Cheese press
description: Turns milk into a block of cheese, and sugarcane into syrup.

name: Compost bin
description: Turns trash into compost. Helpful in making fertilizer.

name: Dehydrator
description: Removes moisture from ocean loot such as oysters and scallops. Produces dried artisan goods.

name: Extractor
description: Extracts and bottles nutrients from kelp.

name: Furnace
description: A machine to make metal bars.

name: Keg
description: Processes fruits or vegetables into beverages. Makes juice, beer, sake, coffee, and green tea.

name: Kiln
description: This processes wood into coal, scrap into glass, and stone into glass.

name: Loom
description: Turns wool into cloth.

name: Mason jar
description: Preserves fruits and vegetables.

name: Mayonnaise machine
description: Turns an egg into a jar of mayonnaise.

name: Mushroom log
description: Add a mushroom to cultivate more.

name: Oil press
description: Used for making all kinds of oil.

name: Recycling machine
description: Turns one resource into another resource.

name: Slime of replication
description: This Slime of Replication can duplicate items. Just give it three days or so.

name: Slime of transmutation
description: Place an item to increase its quality.

name: Solar panel
description: A solar-powered battery converter. It needs to be placed outdoors to harness sunlight and convert it into battery.

name: Tap
description: Collects nutty sap, maple syrup and resin from a tree. Cannot be put on fruit trees.

name: Coral fence
description: Place on the farm.

name: Coral gate
description: Must be installed between 2 fences.

description: Place on the farm.

description: Place on the ground.

name: Hay sign

name: Hedge fence

description: Must be installed between 2 fences.

name: Anemone auto fertilizer
description: An anemone for lumina sprinkler attachment. Automatically applies fertilizer to nearby seeds when loaded with it.

name: Anemone auto harvest
description: An anemone for lumina sprinkler attachment. Automatically harvest underwater crops.

name: Anemone auto seed
description: An anemone for lumina sprinkler attachment. Automatically plants seeds to empty tilled soil when loaded with it.

name: Anemone auto SFH
description: An anemone for lumina sprinkler attachment. Automatically fertilizes, plants seeds and harvest crops to empty tilled soil.

name: Auto chest
description: A chest that automatically pushes or pulls items from machines placed to the right or left of it. Can hold up to 40 objects.

name: Auto collector
description: Automatically collects resources from animals. Must be placed inside a barn or a coop.

name: Auto feeder
description: Place on the farm.

name: Auto fertilizer
description: A sprinkler attachment. Automatically applies fertilizer to nearby seeds when loaded with it.

name: Auto harvest
description: A sprinkler attachment. Automatically harvest crops.

name: Auto petter
description: Place on the farm.

name: Auto seed
description: A sprinkler attachment. Automatically plants seeds to empty tilled soil when loaded with it.

name: Auto SFH
description: A sprinkler attachment. Automatically fertilizes, plants seeds and harvest crops to empty tilled soil.

name: Fertilizer I
description: A chance to grow better quality crops if mixed with soil.

name: Fertilizer II
description: There is an excellent chance to grow better quality crops if mixed with soil.

name: Fertilizer III
description: This will grow better quality crops if mixed with soil.

name: Flash I
description: Increase growth rate a little bit.

name: Flash II
description: Increase growth rate.

name: Flash III
description: Increase growth rate tremendously.

name: Fungarian chest
description: Storage for all kinds of items. Can be placed around the farm, and hold up to 40 objects

name: Hay chest
description: Storage for all kinds of items. Can be placed around the farm, and hold up to 40 objects.

name: Hydro I
description: A chance of the soil staying watered overnight if mixed with soil.

name: Hydro II
description: There is an excellent chance of the soil staying watered overnight if mixed with soil.

name: Hydro III
description: This will keep the soil staying watered overnight if mixed with soil.

name: Lumina sprinkler I
description: An automatic sunlight system for your underwater farm.

name: Lumina sprinkler II
description: An automatic sunlight system for your underwater farm.

name: Lumina sprinkler III
description: An automatic sunlight system for your underwater farm.

name: Makeshift chest
description: Storage for all kinds of items. Can be placed around the farm, and hold up to 20 objects.

name: Ocean Explorer chest
description: Storage for all kinds of items. Can be placed around the farm, and hold up to 40 objects

description: Storage for all kinds of items. Can be placed around the farm, and hold up to 40 objects

name: Scrap chest
description: Storage for all kinds of items. Can be placed around the farm, and hold up to 40 objects.

name: Sprinkler I

name: Sprinkler II
description: An automatic watering system. Waters a 5x5 area.

description: Storage for all kinds of items. Can be placed around the farm, and hold up to 40 objects.

description: Place on the farm.

name: Auto trash collector
description: Place on the ground to collect trash underwater.

name: Bamboo net large
description: Put it in the water to catch fish.

name: Bamboo net small
description: Put it in the water to catch fish.

name: Candied tree seed
description: A craftable snack to satisfy thrifty foragers.

name: Crawler trap
description: A trap.

name: Crawling critter scent
description: A craftable scent that lowers awareness of crawling ocean critters. Can be consumed or attached to a trap.

name: Explosive I
description: Generates a small explosion on land. Can not be used underwater.

name: Explosive II
description: Generates an explosion on land. Can not be used underwater.

name: Explosive III
description: Generates a huge explosion on land. Can not be used underwater.

name: Float trap
description: A trap.

name: Floating critter scent
description: A craftable scent that lowers awareness of floating ocean critters. Can be consumed or attached to a trap.

name: Flower bouquet

name: Flying insect scent

name: Flying insect trap
description: A trap.

name: Ground insect trap
description: A trap.

name: Large fish bait
description: Needs to be attached to a fishing rod.

name: Medium fish bait
description: Needs to be attached to a fishing rod.

name: Monster lure scent
description: The scent lures monsters to attack the wearer.

name: Monster lure scent II
description: Increase spawn scent

name: Monster scent
description: Decrease aggro scent

name: Monster scent II
description: Decrease spawn scent

name: Rope
description: Can be used to descend into the mine.

name: Small fish bait
description: Needs to be attached to a fishing rod.

name: Solar core
description: A magical concentration of sunlight, radiating warmth and joy to its bearer.

name: Vortexanator I
description: Creates a small vortex underwater, perfect for clearing out trash. When used in land, it will collect crops.

name: Vortexanator II
description: Creates a vortex underwater, perfect for clearing out trash. When used in land, it will collect crops.

name: Vortexanator III
description: Creates a huge vortex underwater, perfect for clearing out trash. When used in land, it will collect crops.

name: Warp sesajen
description: A warping device when used on teleport temple. One-time use.

name: Weather conch
description: This mystical conch unlocks the ability to change the weather, but be mindful—it comes at a cost.
